name: Classic Cotton Embroidered Panjabi
description: Crafted from premium long-staple cotton, this panjabi features exquisite hand-embellished embroidery along the placket and collar. Extremely breathable and tailored for an elegant semi-formal drape.

reviews.comment: Absolutely love the fabric quality. The embroidery is extremely neat.
Great fit, very comfortable for daytime events.

name: Royal Mulberry Silk Jamdani Saree
description: Handwoven by master artisans, this pure mulberry silk Jamdani saree showcases intricate traditional geometric motifs. Features a rich zari border and a shimmering pallu that drapes beautifully.

reviews.comment: An absolute masterpiece. The texture of the silk is sublime.

name: Classic Indigo Denim Trucker Jacket
description: A timeless wardrobe essential constructed from durable heavyweight cotton denim. Features silver-tone button closures, button-flap chest pockets, and adjustable waist tabs for a customized fit.

reviews.comment: Excellent build quality. Thick denim and great fitting.
Nice wash. A bit stiff at first but breaks in beautifully.

name: Premium Suede Penny Loafers
description: Handcrafted from top-grade Italian suede, these classic penny loafers feature a cushioned leather-lined footbed and a durable rubber sole for unmatched all-day comfort and sophistication.

reviews.comment: Extremely comfortable right out of the box. Highly recommend the Tan color.

name: Saffiano Leather Minimalist Tote
description: Sophisticated structured handbag made from scratch-resistant Saffiano leather. Designed with a roomy central compartment, interior zip pockets, and elegant gold-plated hardware.

reviews.comment: Spacious and sturdy, perfect for carrying my tablet and planner to work.

name: Chronograph Calfskin Strap Watch
description: An elegant chronograph timepiece with a precise Japanese quartz movement. Paired with a genuine vegetable-tanned full-grain calfskin leather strap that ages beautifully with time.

reviews.comment: A gorgeous watch. Gets compliments every single time I wear it.

name: Premium Linen Summer Kurti
description: Designed for ultimate summer breeziness, this light linen kurti boasts delicate self-stripes and a modern straight-cut silhouette. Featuring button-tab folded sleeves and a subtle mandarin collar.

name: Classic White Retro Sneakers
description: Retro-inspired court sneakers built with soft full-grain leather uppers and comfortable Ortholite insoles. Versatile and clean, making them the perfect companion for trousers, shorts, or chinos.

reviews.comment: Extremely clean look. They go with everything.

name: Floral Pleated Silk Midi Dress
description: A feminine and flowing silhouette crafted from delicate georgette silk. Featuring a wrap-around neck bodice, beautiful micro-pleated skirt detail, and romantic balloon sleeves.

name: Unisex Oversized Cotton Hooded Sweatshirt
description: Knitted from ultra-soft heavyweight French terry cotton. Styled in a loose oversized fit with drop shoulder detailing, a double-lined hood, and deep kangaroo pockets.

name: Tailored Double-Breasted Blazer
description: A masterfully tailored formal blazer made of high-grade wool blend canvas. Styled with structured shoulders, peak lapels, double-breasted horn button closure, and a fully lined inner lining.

reviews.comment: Fabulous custom-tailored feel. Extremely sharp silhouette.

name: Exquisite Golden Zari Banarasi Sherwani
description: Celebrate grand occasions with this royal Banarasi silk sherwani, featuring intricate hand-woven pure gold zari work. Tailored with a structured chest panel, elegant side slits, and complete inner silk lining.

reviews.comment: Fits like royalty. The golden zari thread work is stunning under lighting.
